## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature works as described in design
- [ ] Unit tests cover the core logic
- [ ] Integration test exercises the feature end-to-end
- [ ] `make check` passes (lint + vet + unit tests + build)
- [ ] `make integration` passes
